generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are already stepping up their defense cooperation? Countries like Germany and Japan are increasing their military budgets and working more closely with us. This means we can reduce our own spending without compromising security. Let's focus on what really matters—protecting our civil liberties and preparing for real threats. #StrongerTogether #SmartSecurity
